---
title: "Clustering online poll data: Towards a voting assistance system"
author: "Katakis, I., Tsapatsoulis, N., Triga, V., Tziouvas, C., and Mendez, F."
date: 2012-01-01
description: "IEEE SMAP 2012, 54–59"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
